description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is great for an evening coffee date or a neighbourhood game of cricket! Stylish and feature-packed, this shoe is a great buy not only because it's styled so well, but also because of the quality materials used.Product DetailsSynthetic upper with strategically placed overlays and nubuck overlay at the toe regionLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar for breathable comfort and snug fitCushioned footbed for shock absorptionBranding on the sides, at the back of the collar and on the tongueLightweight midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs on the forefoot and midfoot and circular grooves on the big toe mount for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
